title: Better Gear
description: Makes the iron, gold and diamond tools and armor look like netherite armor.
body:
# Better Gear
This rescource pack makes the iron, gold, and diamond tool and armor netherite style.

<details>
<summary>Items Edited</summary>

Diamond Helmet

Diamond Chestplate

Diamond Leggings

Diamond Boots

Diamond Axe

Diamond Hoe

Diamond Pickaxe

Diamond Shovel

Diamond Sword
## 


Gold Helmet

Gold Chestplate

Gold Leggings

Gold Boots

Gold Axe

Gold Hoe

Gold Pickaxe

Gold Shovel

Gold Sword
## 


Iron Helmet

Iron Chestplate

Iron Leggings

Iron Boots

Iron Axe

Iron Hoe

Iron Pickaxe

Iron Shovel

Iron Sword

</details>
